title: Design Variation System for Vivr Social Posts
description: Enable automated generation of multiple design styles from single content JSON

stories.title: Create StyleConfig TypeScript interface
stories.description: Define centralized style configuration interface with colors, typography, visual effects
acceptanceCriteria: File src/styles/types.ts created with StyleConfig interface
Interface includes colors, typography, visual, cta, safeZone properties
All 6 style names ('dark-bold', 'minimal-clean', 'editorial', 'futuristic', 'high-contrast', 'dark-white') defined as type union
TypeScript compilation succeeds (npx tsc --noEmit returns 0)
Interface exported and importable from other modules
stories.acceptance_pass_criteria: TypeScript compiles, interface has all required properties, type union includes all 6 styles

stories.title: Implement dark-bold style config
stories.description: Create dark-bold style definition (Vivr gradient + OLED black, default style)
acceptanceCriteria: File src/styles/dark-bold.ts created with styleConfig export
Colors defined: #0d0d0d background, #ffffff text primary, Vivr gradient accent
Typography: 36px/900 headline, 14px/500 body, 14.5px/900 CTA
Visual treatment includes vignette, glow effects, gradient separator line
Safe zone padding matches spec (20-36px sides, 20px top, 26px bottom for feed)
JSON output matches StyleConfig interface perfectly
stories.acceptance_pass_criteria: dark-bold.ts exports valid StyleConfig, all colors/typography match spec, compiles without errors

stories.title: Implement minimal-clean style config
stories.description: Create minimal-clean style definition (white background, cyan accent, no glow)
acceptanceCriteria: File src/styles/minimal-clean.ts created
Colors: #ffffff background, #1a1a1a text, #26c6da cyan accent
Typography: 32px/800 headline, 13px/400 body, no text-shadow
Visual treatment: thin borders only (no gradients, no glows)
CTA button: solid cyan with subtle 1px border
Safe zone: generous padding (28-40px sides)
stories.acceptance_pass_criteria: minimal-clean.ts exports valid StyleConfig, white background, no gradients/glows, cyan accent

stories.title: Implement editorial style config
stories.description: Create editorial style (charcoal + magenta, serif typography, magazine aesthetic)
acceptanceCriteria: File src/styles/editorial.ts created
Colors: #f5f3f0 warm off-white background, #2c2c2c charcoal, #e94899 magenta
Typography direction includes serif font reference (Georgia fallback)
Headline: 34px/700 weight serif, body: 14px/400 serif
Visual accents: 3px solid magenta top border, thin divider lines
CTA: solid charcoal background, simple rectangular style
stories.acceptance_pass_criteria: editorial.ts exports valid StyleConfig, warm off-white background, serif typography, magenta accent

stories.title: Implement futuristic style config
stories.description: Create futuristic style (neon cyan/magenta, deep navy, glow effects, tech aesthetic)
acceptanceCriteria: File src/styles/futuristic.ts created
Colors: #0a0e27 navy background, #00d9ff neon cyan, #a000ff neon magenta, #e0e0ff cool white text
Typography: 38px/900 headline with 0.5px spacing, 13px/400 body
Visual treatment: headline glow effect (drop-shadow: 0 0 12px cyan, 0 0 24px magenta)
CTA: neon cyan background with dual-layer glow, navy text
All-caps or title-case headline direction
stories.acceptance_pass_criteria: futuristic.ts exports valid StyleConfig, neon colors, dual glow effects on headline and CTA

stories.title: Implement high-contrast style config
stories.description: Create high-contrast style (WCAG AAA, black/white + golden yellow, maximum readability)
acceptanceCriteria: File src/styles/high-contrast.ts created
Colors: #ffffff white background, #000000 black text, #ffcc00 golden yellow accent
Contrast ratios: 21:1 primary text, 19:1 secondary text (verified)
Typography: 40px/900 headline, 15px/600 body, zero letter-spacing
CTA: golden yellow background, black text, bold 2px border, rectangular (0px radius)
Visual accents: bold geometric borders, strong divider lines, flat design (no shadows)
stories.acceptance_pass_criteria: high-contrast.ts exports valid StyleConfig, 21:1 contrast ratio on text, golden yellow accent, no shadows

stories.title: Implement dark-white style config
stories.description: Create dark-white style (monochromatic, black + white, elegant simplicity, premium positioning)
acceptanceCriteria: File src/styles/dark-white.ts created
Colors: #ffffff white background, #000000 black text primary, #4a4a4a dark gray secondary
Typography: 35px/700 headline, 14px/400 body, -0.5px letter-spacing
Visual accents: thin 1px borders, geometric dividers, minimal shadows (0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.1))
CTA: solid black background, white text, minimal 1px border, 6px border-radius
Safe zone: balanced padding (24-32px sides)
stories.acceptance_pass_criteria: dark-white.ts exports valid StyleConfig, pure black/white colors, monochromatic design

stories.title: Create style index and export system
stories.description: Create src/styles/index.ts to export all style configs and provide getStyleConfig() function
acceptanceCriteria: File src/styles/index.ts created
Exports all 6 style modules
Function getStyleConfig(name?: string): StyleConfig implemented
Default parameter returns 'dark-bold' when undefined
Type safety: returns error on invalid style name (TypeScript catches at compile time)
Example usage: getStyleConfig('minimal-clean') returns correct config
stories.acceptance_pass_criteria: index.ts exports all styles, getStyleConfig() defaults to dark-bold, type-safe lookup works

stories.title: Extend ContentJSON schema with designVariation field
stories.description: Update src/content-schema.ts to include optional designVariation field
acceptanceCriteria: ContentJSON interface includes designVariation?: string field
designVariation field type: 'dark-bold' | 'minimal-clean' | 'editorial' | 'futuristic' | 'high-contrast' | 'dark-white'
Field is optional (backward compatible, defaults to 'dark-bold')
TypeScript compilation succeeds
Existing content-feed.json files remain valid without designVariation
stories.acceptance_pass_criteria: ContentJSON interface extended, designVariation field optional, backward compatible

stories.title: Update renderer.ts to apply style configs to templates
stories.description: Modify src/renderer.ts to wire designVariation param through render pipeline and pass StyleConfig to templates
acceptanceCriteria: applyTemplate() function signature updated to accept styleConfig parameter
renderFromContent() extracts designVariation from content and retrieves StyleConfig
StyleConfig passed to all 6 template builders (split, overlay, frame, phone-float, phone-tilt, story)
Default to dark-bold style when designVariation is undefined
TypeScript compilation succeeds
No changes to template file paths or build logic
stories.acceptance_pass_criteria: renderer.ts wires StyleConfig through pipeline, defaults to dark-bold, passes style to all templates

stories.title: Update split template to use StyleConfig
stories.description: Modify src/templates/split.ts to accept and apply StyleConfig instead of hardcoded styles
acceptanceCriteria: buildSplit() function signature updated: (variant, imageSrc, styleConfig: StyleConfig)
All hardcoded colors replaced with styleConfig values (#0d0d0d → styleConfig.colors.background, etc)
Typography sizes/weights injected from styleConfig (headline: ${styleConfig.typography.headline.size})
Visual effects (vignette, glow, borders) applied from styleConfig.visual
CTA styling uses styleConfig.cta properties
HTML output identical to original when using dark-bold config
Different output verified for minimal-clean config (white background vs black)
stories.acceptance_pass_criteria: split.ts uses StyleConfig, outputs dark OLED for dark-bold, outputs white for minimal-clean

stories.title: Verify all templates render with each style (visual QA)
stories.description: Generate sample HTML + PNG for all 6 templates × 6 styles combination and verify visual correctness
acceptanceCriteria: Test content created: outputs/test-variations/content-feed.json with designVariation field for each style
Run: npx ts-node src/run-render.ts outputs/test-variations/content-feed.json (6 times, one per style)
Verify: 36 HTML files generated (6 templates × 6 styles) without errors
Verify: dark-bold renders with Vivr gradient and OLED black
Verify: minimal-clean renders with white background and cyan accent
Verify: futuristic renders with neon colors and glow effects
Verify: high-contrast renders with 21:1 contrast ratio (visual check)
No console errors or warnings in render output
stories.acceptance_pass_criteria: All 6 styles render across split template, colors/typography match spec visually
